question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/domain/contract/ContractResult.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: toContractTransactionHash()] Can an unprivileged external user submit an Ethereum transaction that results in a null payerAccountId on the ContractResult, causing toContractTransactionHash() to throw a NullPointerException at payerAccountId.getId(), crashing the importer pipeline and preventing all subsequent transactions from being gossiped or persisted?
